case_title: TMP WORLDWIDE VS. FREEBORDERS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TMP WORLDWIDE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEBORDERS, INC. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-30-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TMP WORLDWIDE SERVED MAY-14-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FREEBORDERS, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
1ST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FOR STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT SHOULD BE $261.20, HOWEVER DEFENDANT PAID A TOTAL OF $261.80 -- OVERPAYMENT OF $.60, RECEIPT NO. 11788
FEE PAID FOR STIPULATION & ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TMP WORLDWIDE
1ST APPEARANCE FEE PAID ON STIPULATION & ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FREEBORDERS, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2003 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOV-17-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TMP WORLDWIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEBORDERS, INC. $93,015.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $93,675.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
